description: CompositionRed and grey sleeveless printed tunic made of sheer, woven 100% polyester fabric, has ruffles and satin tape detail at the neck and armholes, flaring pin-tucks from the neck and back neck, keyholde detail with a button at the back, red lining and the front hem shorter than the backFitRegularWash careRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironThe crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this top, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, leggings (or tights) and a floral scarf. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
